title: CRUD: Confirm Delete
intent: Confirm destructive actions with clear consequences.
Avoid accidental deletion and provide safe defaults.
structure: Use a dialog for destructive confirmation when action is irreversible or high-impact.
Explain what will be deleted and if it can be undone.
Default focus on the safest action (Cancel).

keyboard: Dialog traps focus; Esc closes only if dismissible is appropriate.
Default focus is on Cancel; Delete requires deliberate action.
aria: Dialog has a clear title and description; buttons have clear labels.

rules: Destructive action is visually distinct and clearly labeled ("Delete project").
If undo is possible, communicate it and provide an immediate undo action (toast).
error_messaging: If delete fails: "Couldn’t delete. Try again."

examples.title: Dialog copy skeleton
examples.html: This will permanently delete Alpha.
